SourceString:
Adjusts the overall difficulty of the game. 

 <Bold>Easy:</> Focuses more on the story. Provides light combat gameplay.

 <Bold>Normal:</> Standard gameplay experience. 

 <Bold>Hard:</> A challenging difficulty. 

 <Bold>Hell:</> An extreme difficulty. Not recommended for beginners or first playthroughs.
